name: urdf-parser-py

metadata.name: urdf-parser-py
metadata.summary: This package contains a python parser for the Unified Robot Description Format (URDF), which is an XML format for representing a robot model.

documentation:
# urdf_parser_py

This package contains a python parser for the Unified Robot Description Format (URDF), which is an XML format for representing a robot model.

documentation: Simplify yaml representation for pretty printing

methods.name: urdf_parser_py.urdf.Robot.from_parameter_server
documentation:
Retrieve the robot model on the parameter server
and parse it to create a URDF robot structure.

Warning: this requires roscore to be running.

methods.name: urdf_parser_py.xml_reflection.core.ValueType.write_xml
documentation:
If type has 'write_xml', this function should expect to have it's own
XML already created i.e., In Axis.to_sdf(self, node), 'node' would be
the 'axis' element.
@todo Add function that makes an XML node completely independently?
